products.title: Handmade Sneaker High
products.description: A classic high top court sneaker, stripped-down to the bare essentials and meticulously handmade in Italy from a single piece of semi cordovan leather. Raw, unlined edges highlight the simplicity and beauty of natural materials, while exposed stitching honors the human craftsmanship behind each handmade sneaker. products.title: Handmade Runner
products.description: The FEIT Handmade Runner is a low-profile low top runner and walking sneaker , designed for natural movement and everyday comfort. Goodyear handmade in Italy the shoe FEIT’s commitment to human craftsmanship and timeless construction. The upper is cut from a single piece of chrome free semi cordovan leather, selected for its elasticity, breathability, and ability to conform to the foot over time.

products.title: Trek 87.5%
products.description: FEIT TREK 87.5% is made in the Montebelluna Sport System region, located in the foothills of the Italian Alps. Long recognized as the outdoor Sport System manufacturing capital of the world, I built my first design team in Montebelluna in 1998 and returned in 2022 with the goal of building the world's most natural outdoor trekking shoe for FEIT. products.title: Latex Loafer
products.description: A classic moccasin style pennyloafer re-imagined and re-stitched by hand from two pieces of buttery suede. The natural materials and exposed stitching recall the human craftsmanship behind each pair. The addition of a natural latex outsole and goodyear construction provides comfort, flexibility and a silhouette unique in the category. Final Sale.

products.title: PAIR OF LEATHER LACES
products.description: Laces are recommended for our classic Low, High and Hiker styles. They also pair well with our athletic styles, including the Runner, Biotrainer and Latex Low. Longer laces are necessary for our Men's Military Hiker.

products.title: Full Rebuild
products.description: Full leather sole replacement + Wrap Replacement Each pair of FEIT shoes is handmade by a single craftsman, ensuring individual attention to every product. Everyday wear and tear may undo the craftsmans’ artistry, which is why we offer wrap replacement. *Current wait times for repairs are 6 - 8 weeks.

products.title: Leather Shoe Care Kit
products.description: The FEIT Leather Care Kit contains everything you need to clean and maintain leather shoes and accessories: FEIT x Skidmore’s Leather Cream; 100% cotton polishing cloth; small round horsehair dauber brush; large horsehair brush. Like all FEIT shoes, the all-natural wooden brush handles will develop a patina over time. We recommend this care kit for leather shoes only. We do not recommend using lea

products.title: Leather Footbed
products.description: Buffalo leather is used for our insoles due to its dual qualities of softness and strength. A set of buffalo leather insoles is included with each pair of FEIT shoes to assist with in-between sizing, ensure complete comfort, and mold to your foot.

products.title: Cork Footbed
products.description: Cork is used in our insoles for its inherent qualities of elasticity and ability to control climate and comfort. A set of extra cork and buffalo leather insoles is included with each pair of FEIT shoes to assist with in-between sizing and to ensure complete comfort. The cork insole can be fitted underneath the buffalo leather insole for additional padding that will mold to your foot.

products.title: Wool Footbed
products.description: This shearling wool footbed can replace your leather insoles. It can fit most FEIT styles in sizes 6-11.

products.title: Wool Footbed
products.description: This shearling wool footbed can replace your leather insoles. It can fit most FEIT styles in sizes 6-11.

products.title: Suede Shoe Care Kit
products.description: The FEIT Suede Shoe Care Kit contains a suede eraser and a small brush to freshen shoes and remove dirt. Like all FEIT shoes, the wooden brush handle will develop a patina over time. Directions: Use the small brush to remove surface dust and dirt, then use the suede eraser to spot clean and remove marks. Finish by brushing the suede again to revitalize and restore the texture.
